calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
